creator: onestsam@gmail.com
text: I svn my /usr/src with head on a daily basis and rebuild universe about every six months and I always have to include net/bpf.h to spamlogd.c. If you can successfully build spamd without doing so, may I be so bold as to suggest your /use/src is corrupted. Possibly a mixture of freebsd 10 and 11 src.
